29#define NV 6
30#define FILAMENT 1
31#define SHIFT 0.5
32
33#define ORDER_FOR_GROUPS 2
34#define ORDER_FOR_CATALOG 3
35
36extern int ngroups;
37
38typedef struct
39{
40 int M, i;
41 double q[3], v[3], D, z;
42#ifdef TWO_LPT
43 double D2, v2[3];
44#ifdef THREE_LPT
45 double D31, v31[3], D32, v32[3];
46#endif
47#endif
48} pos_data;
49pos_data obj, obj1, obj2;
50
51typedef struct
52{
53 unsigned long long int name;
54 double M, q[3], x[3], v[3];
55 int n, pad;
56} catalog_data;
57
58void condition_for_accretion(int, int, int, int, double, int, double *, double *);
59void condition_for_merging(double, int, int, int *);
60void set_obj(int, double, pos_data *);

68void merge_groups(int, int, double);
